candidate_summary: PIPA-BEND: 4-string per-head spectral allocation with continuous pitch-bend + tremolo + cross-band harmonics. Partition transformer heads into 4 spectral bands per layer (analog of 4 pipa strings); per-head attention restricted to its band's spectral signature via learned spectral mask; learned per-token RoPE phase offset δ_t for continuous pitch-bend; per-band amplitude modulation (tremolo); cross-band Hadamard product for harmonic interaction.
content_words: continuous pitch-bend learned per-token RoPE offset

results.name: Learning to Rotate Temporal Semantic Rotary Encoding (2604.24717)
results.description: Dual-branch SIREN-DNN maps continuous timestamps to per-dimension rotation angles for periodic + aperiodic structure.
keyword_matches: continuous pitch-bend learned per-token RoPE offset
results.rationale: Learned continuous per-token rotation angle offset IS exactly the continuous pitch-bend RoPE offset mechanism (component 2). Direct functional twin.

results.name: Dynamic RoPE Adjustments Transformers Emergentmind
results.description: Context-aware RoPE (CARoPE) with dynamic per-head + per-token phase shifts.
keyword_matches: continuous pitch-bend learned per-token RoPE offset
results.rationale: Per-head + per-token RoPE phase shifts IS exactly the per-band per-token learned pitch-bend offset mechanism (components 1+2 combined).

results.name: Rethinking Attention Output Hadamard (2603.08343)
results.description: Walsh-Hadamard structured output projection — 25% parameter reduction + global cross-head interaction.
results.rationale: Walsh-Hadamard structured projection with cross-head interaction matches the cross-band Hadamard harmonic mechanism (component 4).

results.name: Hadamard Attention Recurrent Transformer HART (2501.01023)
results.description: HART stereo Hadamard product attention with MKOI cross-band cross-spatial integration.
results.rationale: Stereo Hadamard product with explicit cross-band integration is direct match for cross-band Hadamard harmonic mechanism (component 4).

results.name: AMSFormer Multi-Scale Spectral Filtering
results.description: Hierarchical frequency-domain filtering with periodic component isolation + multi-scale partitioning.
results.rationale: Hierarchical multi-scale spectral partitioning matches the multi-band per-head spectral allocation paradigm (component 1).

results.name: Spectral-Spatial Wave Frequency Interactive Transformer
results.description: Frequency-aware + phase-aware token representations in unified Transformer.
keyword_matches: continuous pitch-bend learned per-token RoPE offset
results.rationale: Frequency + phase-aware token combination covers band-allocation + phase-bend combined paradigm (components 1+2).

results.name: Sparse Spectral Transformer Dynamic Frequency-Aware Attention
results.description: Dynamic frequency-aware attention for scalable multimodal fusion.
results.rationale: Dynamic frequency-aware attention is the dynamic per-band spectral allocation paradigm (component 1).

results.name: MFformer Multi-Frequency Feature Aggregation
results.description: Multi-frequency aggregation transformer for time-series; multi-band partitioning.
results.rationale: Multi-frequency aggregation with multi-band partitioning is direct match for multi-band per-head spectral allocation (component 1).

decision_rationale: All 8 search results exceed semantic (>=0.7) and functional (>=0.7) thresholds; results 1-2 are direct twins for the learned per-token RoPE offset mechanism (Learning to Rotate, CARoPE), results 3-4 cover cross-band Hadamard harmonic interaction, and results 5-8 cover the multi-band per-head spectral allocation paradigm. The recombination is fully anticipated by prior art — no novel mechanism survives. PIPA-BEND fails as non-novel.
